title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Sanji, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Reiju, Unknown person #7 as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Get the hell outta my sight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You always were an annoy- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We only came here to bring you back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to get to this point... to stand right before you... Luffy spent the entire night...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Putting his life on the line against an enemy woman-der! He's at his limit...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't make any excuses... whatever happens here... I'm fine with it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Get your sorry ass outta here already!!

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 27 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
